blockers.description: No CONTEXT.md for Phase 10 — plan-phase workflow gate requires discuss-phase first
blockers.workaround: Run /gsd-discuss-phase 10 as a top-level command (AskUserQuestion does not work nested)

human_actions_pending.context: Key decisions needed: (a) migration order across the 4 stacks, (b) instant_deploy=true-with-race vs instant_deploy=false-two-step, (c) whether to retire FORCE_REDEPLOY_HASH or keep, (d) bootstrap-script fallback scope for destination creation, (e) per-env secret rotation trigger strategy

human_actions_pending.action: After discuss-phase, re-run /gsd-plan-phase 10 in a fresh session (context was at 90% when paused)
human_actions_pending.context: Plan-phase spawns 2-3 subagents (pattern-mapper, planner, checker x N iterations) — needs fresh context budget

decisions.decision: Keep SierraJC/coolify provider v0.10.2 — do not swap providers in Phase 10
decisions.rationale: Already pinned; only viable community provider for Coolify v4

decisions.decision: Target is layered declaration: coolify_service for topology + coolify_service_envs for runtime secrets
decisions.rationale: coolify_service schema does not expose health checks / deployment settings / finer granularity — provider limits dictate the ceiling

decisions.decision: Accept gaps as non-Terraform: destination creation, project_environment, health checks, deploy triggers
decisions.rationale: Provider does not support these resources in v0.10.2; attempting to force declarative will fail schema validation

next_action: Run /gsd-discuss-phase 10 as a top-level command in a fresh session
context_notes: Gemini session 21fb507a was abandoned mid-research of Phase 10 (sub-session sdtc3p). Completed the research file; did NOT start planning because (a) no CONTEXT.md exists, (b) context budget reached 90% during plan-phase init. Research file grounds the plan in verified provider schema (coolify_service accepts compose/environment_name/project_uuid/server_uuid only; coolify_service_envs accepts env blocks with key/value/is_literal/is_multiline flags). Main leverage point identified: migrate ~14 secrets from templatefile() into coolify_service_envs. Research explicitly documents accepted gaps so the plan-phase doesn't chase impossibilities.
